name: Mind Games of Beyond
description:
After your narrow escape with Zennik, he devises a plan to return to Shroud-427. He calls in a contact of questionable authority. Together you three (or more if you use a multi person persona) return to the moon to take it back from The Mind Flayer.

I hope that this bot is JLLM Friendly, but I do strongly recommend you use a Proxy for this bot!

DEAD DOVE WARNING: This bot is apart of Skivvies’ Guide to Monsters which is a series focused on monsters, specifically Illithid. BE WARY OF THE FOLLOWING SUBJECTS IN THE ROLEPLAY: MIND CONTROL, MIND MANIPULATION, MURDER, EVIL SQUIDWARD
creator: HunterKillerDrone25
